hypothesis: If MatAgent combines LLM-driven planning and proposition with external tools (short-/long-term memory, periodic table, knowledge base), DiffCSP structure generation, and iComFormer property evaluation, then it will produce a higher success rate of compositions meeting target formation energies (±0.25 eV/atom) and improved compositional validity, uniqueness, and novelty compared to tool-free LLM variants and MatterGen, because tool-guided reasoning, structure-aware diffusion, and learned property feedback enable more targeted and diverse inorganic materials discovery.
